steps: Go to https://cloud.livekit.io/ and sign up or log in
Create a new project or select an existing one from the dashboard
Give the key a descriptive name
Copy both the 'API Key' and 'API Secret' — the secret will only be shown once
Also note your project's 'WebSocket URL' (e.g., wss://your-project.livekit.cloud) — this is your base URL for API calls

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your LiveKit API Key (used as the key in JWT tokens for authorization)

credential_fields.name: api_secret
credential_fields.label: API Secret
credential_fields.description: Your LiveKit API Secret (used to sign JWT tokens — keep this secret)

notes: LiveKit uses JWT-based authentication — the API key and secret are used to sign tokens, not sent directly as bearer tokens
The base URL is project-specific (e.g., https://your-project.livekit.cloud), not a single fixed URL
LiveKit Cloud free tier includes 50 concurrent participants and 50GB egress per month
API Secret is shown only once at creation — store it immediately in a secrets manager
Self-hosted LiveKit is also available as an open-source option
